Publications

Publications are sourced from DBLP (cached locally as of 2026-03-23).

2025

Analyzing the Influence of Knowledge Graph Information on Relation Extraction

Cedric Möller, Ricardo Usbeck ESWC (1), pp. 460-480

ShortPathQA: A Dataset for Controllable Fusion of Large Language Models with Knowledge Graphs

Mikhail Salnikov, Andrey Sakhovskiy, Irina Nikishina, Aida Usmanova, Angelie Kraft, Cedric Möller, Debayan Banerjee, Junbo Huang, Longquan Jiang, Rana Abdullah, Xi Yan, Elena Tutubalina, Ricardo Usbeck, Alexander Panchenko NLDB (1), pp. 95-110

Ontology-Guided, Hybrid Prompt Learning for Generalization in Knowledge Graph Question Answering

Longquan Jiang, Junbo Huang, Cedric Möller, Ricardo Usbeck ICSC, pp. 28-35

2024

QALD-10 - The 10th Challenge on Question Answering over Linked Data: Shifting from DBpedia to Wikidata as a KG for KGQA

Ricardo Usbeck, Xi Yan, Aleksandr Perevalov, Longquan Jiang, Julius Schulz, Angelie Kraft, Cedric Möller, Junbo Huang, Jan Reineke, Axel-Cyrille Ngonga Ngomo, Muhammad Saleem, Andreas Both Semantic Web 15(6), pp. 2193-2207

DISCIE - Discriminative Closed Information Extraction

Cedric Möller, Ricardo Usbeck ISWC (2), pp. 23-40

Entity Linking with Out-of-Knowledge-Graph Entity Detection and Clustering Using Only Knowledge Graphs

Cedric Möller, Ricardo Usbeck SEMANTICS, pp. 88-105

Incorporating Type Information into Zero-Shot Relation Extraction

Ricardo Usbeck, Cedric Möller TEXT2KG/DQMLKG@ESWC

Event Extraction Alone Is Not Enough

Junbo Huang, Longquan Jiang, Cedric Möller, Ricardo Usbeck Text2Story@ECIR, pp. 105-114

2023

Biomedical Entity Linking with Triple-aware Pre-Training

Xi Yan, Cedric Möller, Ricardo Usbeck arXiv preprint

2022

Survey on English Entity Linking on Wikidata: Datasets and Approaches

Cedric Möller, Jens Lehmann, Ricardo Usbeck Semantic Web 13(6), pp. 925-966

Knowledge Graph Population with Out-of-KG Entities

Cedric Möller ESWC (Satellite Events), pp. 199-214
